pipeline: BiRAGAS CRISPR Complete v3.0 — PDAC Analysis
bottleneck: KRAS G12D compensation network — single-target therapies fail due to MAPK↔PI3K crosstalk

MIR21.rationale: Direct mature miRNA knockdown; Cas9 for permanent KO of pre-miRNA locus

MIR155.rationale: Direct mature miRNA knockdown; Cas9 for permanent KO of pre-miRNA locus

HOTAIR.rationale: Indels often non-disruptive for lncRNAs; promoter silencing preferred

MALAT1.rationale: Indels often non-disruptive for lncRNAs; promoter silencing preferred

report.narrative: BiRAGAS CRISPR Complete analysis identified 36 regulatory genes. 36 are causal drivers (|ACE| > 0.1), 26 strong drivers (|ACE| > 0.3). 36 genes validated by knockout prediction. 7 genes have RNA-level evidence (Cas13/CRISPRi/Perturb-seq). 2 are Core Essential (targeting risks lethality). 34 non-essential drivers recommended for therapeutic targeting. DNA+RNA dual-validated targets have highest confidence.
